meaning: n.[动]跳羚(产于非洲南部,受惊时能跳很高)
examples: Three cheetahs tuck in just after running down a pregnant springbok on a cold winter's morning.
They afford an opportunity for people from all backgrounds to encounter a range of animals from drone bees to springbok or salmon to better understand the natural world we live in.
See robben island (robben-island.org.za), then take a bus (intercape.co.za) to Springbok.
Jones enhanced his scrummage reputation after his performance against Springbok prop Tendai "The Beast" Mtawarira.
Former Springbok fly-half Derrick Hougaard kicked 14 points as Sarries sealed an impressive victory.
